title: selaginella lobbii
intro: Selaginella lobbii, also known as the spikemoss, is a species of evergreen, perennial plant in the family Selaginellaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of Selaginella lobbii include its potential to help alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Selaginella lobbii is typically prepared as a herbal tea or dried extract, and can also be used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
